fixtures._comment: prebuilt-popup — single turn proving the CopilotPopup component renders and messages round-trip inside its .copilotKitPopup root. The probe asserts the popup root is visible and the assistant response lands inside it.

response.content: Hello from the popup — the CopilotPopup prebuilt component is wired up and reachable. The launcher floats in the corner and the chat sits in an overlay panel.
